title: phoebe yaiensis
intro: Phoebe yaiensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae, native to Thailand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Phoebe yaiensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Phoebe yaiensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional Thai medicine to promote overall well-being.
